basic_details.job_title: DPHCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 23 Technical and Non-Technical Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Engineer, Accounts Officer, Junior Assistant and More Posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 53 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Diploma in Engineering with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Electrical): Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Electrical Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Planning): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Stores): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Billing & Contract): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Assistant Engineer (Administration): Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Accounts Officer: Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Assistant: Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Computer Programmer: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer Programming / Software Development / IT related field. Stenographer (English): Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Stenography / Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence. Junior Assistant: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence. Computer Operator: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence.

salary_details.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Electrical): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Planning): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Stores): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Billing & Contract): Rs. 30000/- per month Assistant Engineer (Administration): Rs. 40000/- per month Accounts Officer: Rs. 40000/- per month Assistant: Rs. 30000/- per month Computer Programmer: Rs. 30000/- per month Stenographer (English): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Assistant: Rs. 20000/- per month Computer Operator: Rs. 20000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DPHCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dphc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DPHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the DPHCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DPHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 23 vacancies announced for various posts in the Delhi Police Housing Corporation Limited (DPHCL) Recruitment 2026. These include positions like Junior Engineer, Assistant Engineer, Accounts Officer, and others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for DPHCL jobs?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for most of the posts is a Diploma in Engineering or Graduation in any discipline, depending on the specific post. Relevant experience is also a key requirement for most positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to DPHCL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under DPHCL Recruitment 2026 is 53 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Assistant post in the DPHCL Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 20,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for DPHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DPHCL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or by hand to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DPHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for the DPHCL Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these DPHCL positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the advertised positions in the DPHCL Recruitment 2026 is contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Delhi Police Housing Corporation Limited (DPHCL), an organization responsible for housing projects related to the Delhi Police.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Delhi Police Housing Corporation Limited, which is www.dphc.gov.in. Ensure you download the correct documents for the 2026 recruitment.
